title: HAPwave_bids

funding_references.funder_name: The DERIVE Office and the Mayo Clinic Center for Biomedical Discovery

funding_references.award_title: CRCNS: Processing speed in the human connectome across the lifespan

description: This dataset comprises intracranial EEG recordings from 8 patients undergoing single-pulse electrical stimulation of limbic system structures during rest. The data were collected to investigate electrical stimulation-driven network interactions in the human brain, with stimulation parameters of 200 microseconds duration, biphasic waveforms, and 6 mA amplitude (4 mA for one subject). The dataset is organized according to BIDS specification and includes raw iEEG recordings with associated metadata and event timing information.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings were acquired from 8 patients at rest during single-pulse electrical stimulation. Stimulation parameters: 200 microsecond duration, biphasic waveforms, 6 mA amplitude (4 mA for subject 7). Data organized in BIDS format with electrode localization and event timing metadata.
